Document:
# Path of Void
Difficulty: [color=lime]Easy[/color]
The Path of Void focuses on stealth, freezing cold, mobility and depressurization. Pick this path if you enjoy being a highly mobile assassin who leaves their foes struggling to catch up.
## Pros
- Your spells apply a stacking debuff that chills and slows targets. - Early mobility spell. - Highly stealthy.
## Cons
- Has a difficult time fighting opponents immune to cold effects. - Has a difficult time with silicon-based lifeforms.
## Knowledge
Knowledge Name Ingredients/Type Description
Glimmer of Winter Knife, Cold atmosphere Creates a void blade.
Grasp of Void Passive Ability Your grasp will mute and chill victims.
Mark of Void Passive Ability Your grasp will now apply the void mark, freezing, muting, and applying void chill your target when activated.
Void Phase Active Ability Teleports you to the target destination, damaging and muting nearby creatures.
Void Prison Active Ability Locks your target in a frozen ball, making them unable to act, speak, or be damaged. Applies a void chill when they thaw.
Void Pull Active Ability Pulls nearby heathens towards you, knocking them over, damaging, and applying void chill to them.
Seeking Blade Passive Ability Your blade now freezes and applies void chill to enemies, as well as allowing you to teleport next to them by clicking them.
Void Conduit Active Ability Summons a void conduit that periodically pulses; breaking airlocks and windows, applying void chill to heathens, and granting heretics immunity to low pressures.
Waltz at the End of Time Three corpses in a cold atmosphere Summons a winter storm on the station. Everything around you gets frozen and cursed by void chill. All your spell cooldowns are halved. You get full pressure and temperature immunity as well as thermal and night vision. You waltz in air at quickened speed.
## Armor and Passive Ability
Name Effect
T1 Passive Immunity to low temperatures.
Hollow Weave Immunity to space hazards. Getting melee attacked denies the attack and makes you invisible temporarily, after that ability goes on cooldown
T2 Passive Breathing immunity
T3 Passive Slowdown resistance
## Tips
- Your Mansus Grasp allows you to mute your targets, making it ideal for silent assassinations. The grasp also applies a mark that when triggered by the void blade will apply the maximum amount of stacks of void chill to your target, slowing them down to a crawl. - Void Cloak side knowledge can be used to hide one of your blades and a Codex Cicatrix when the hood is down, while acting as a focus when it's up. - Void chill is a debuff applied by your spells, your grasp, your mark and your blade once you unlock the upgrade. Each stack slows your target movement speed by roughly 5% and makes them gradually colder, up to a maximum of 5 stacks. - At 5 stacks void chill will also prevent your target from heating up. - Void prison can put a target in stasis for 5 seconds. Ideal if you are fighting multiple opponents and need to isolate one target at a time. - Void Conduit is your signature ability. It slowly destroys windows and airlocks around its area of effect. Use it to depressurize the station and expand your domain.
